text: @omwambaKE I say, Luos are the most used lot in this country! Most goons are from my community! They are being used by politicians, and look at the situation back home. Before you attend political rallies, please ask yourself: Home iko aje! May God help us.
label: neither
rationale: Author self-identifies as Luo and criticises political manipulation of their own community - self-critique and a call for reflection, not contempt from outside.

text: RT @KaguchiaMp: SHAME ON YOU MURKOMEN! YOU HAVE THE INTENTIONS OF BURNING THIS NATION BUT WE WILL NOT ALLOW YOU!
label: offensive
rationale: 'SHAME ON YOU MURKOMEN' and 'INTENTIONS OF BURNING THIS NATION' - aggressive personal attack on a named individual politician, no ethnic group targeted.

text: @MkenyaMzi Kalenjins & kikuyus ruling since independence understand the assignment> kiss the global elites agenda to maximum! Sink their faces so deep the ass of pedophiles to the point its a Jejunum interaction! Lamba matako ya Jeffrey epstien inc.kabisa! gachagua makachiethaa! Useless!
label: hate
rationale: 'Kalenjins & kikuyus ruling since independence' framed as collectively servile to paedophile elites - collective degradation of two ethnic communities mixed with a personal slur at Gachagua.

text: @droid254 Luos have never made good leaders, look at their fellow primitives in south Sudan, look at northern Uganda, they are shit.they should just stick to fighting sickle cell and simping.
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos have never made good leaders' and 'primitives' collectively declare an ethnic community unfit to lead and ridiculed - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @omwambaKE Shameless Jaluo za ukimwi goons, these are the tinshacks where your mothers live in nyanza, just like kibera. A pile of mud is free, yet he couldn't seal the holes in his mother's room. A can of paint is 1K,yet he couldn't paint his mother's house. Uselelss takataka za tutam.
label: hate
rationale: 'Jaluo za ukimwi' links an ethnic group collectively to HIV/AIDS as a degrading attribute - ethnic slur fusing a disease stigma with a tribal label.

text: @Realkangethe The EMPTY Headed KIKUYUS have decided to target LUO Celebrities THEY can't talk of Wahu ,Nazizi or and other Woman Celebrity who are no longer youthful But give it to the Wamunyoro DIMWITS to target Talia
label: hate
rationale: 'EMPTY Headed KIKUYUS' and 'DIMWITS' collectively attribute stupidity to an ethnic community - NCIC collective contempt.

text: @ConradKulo We luhyas are generally stupid
label: neither
rationale: Author self-identifies as Luhya and makes a self-deprecating collective statement about their own community - no outside contempt; akin to in-group self-critique.

text: @DrDennisOuma President ruto anapeleka mitungi ya gas murima, mattresses, boats, chicken lakini anapeana ma panga kwa wajaluo uncircumcised baboons 😂😂😂he has turn a community full of elites to goonism, shame shame on you foreskin nation
label: hate
rationale: 'wajaluo uncircumcised baboons' and 'foreskin nation' dehumanise and collectively ridicule the Luo community using primate language and cultural mockery.

text: @KenyanSays What's with kalenjins and speaking with high pitched low testosterone voices like hoes, that's why the country is in a mess. FUCKING CLOWNS. #RUTOMUSTGO #WANTAM
label: hate
rationale: 'kalenjins and speaking with high pitched low testosterone voices like hoes' collectively ridicules and degrades an ethnic community by mocking their speech - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @skmusyoka you're afraid of giving the corrupt kalenjins at @IEBCKenya the final ultimatums of quiting the job if they bungle the elections, #DCP #RUTOMUSTGO #WANTAM
label: hate
rationale: 'the corrupt kalenjins at @IEBCKenya' attributes corruption collectively to the Kalenjin ethnic community rather than to named individuals at that institution.

text: @NaksLfcRed @WuodJery @HEBabuOwino true. luos are saddists and you can see how they disaproved matiangi and kalonzo. They just want for themselves. You can hear them saying its only kikuyus and kalenjin but if you give them option they dont want they only want their own and since non is there theychose ruto
label: hate
rationale: 'luos are saddists' and 'they just want for themselves' collectively attributes negative moral characteristics - selfishness, sadism - to an entire ethnic community.

text: @BMakhabila @ConradKulo Correction luhyas from kabras are idiots
label: hate
rationale: 'luhyas from kabras are idiots' collectively attributes stupidity to a named sub-ethnic community - NCIC ethnic contempt even in mild-toned phrasing.

text: There are two most tribal communities in Kenya, the Gikuyus and Kalenjin. You may seem to be fighting for a better Kenya but it's for your own interests first.
label: hate
rationale: 'two most tribal communities' collectively attributes the negative characteristic of ethnic chauvinism to Kikuyu and Kalenjin as communities - NCIC collective contempt, no named individual.

text: @StandardKenya These Yamunes have a notorious habit of seizing any land they come across. Look at their master, the crook has an insatiable appetite for land. He has grabbed nearly all public/ private lands. They are nothing but bandits. Grabbing and looting appear to be embedded in their DNA.
label: hate
rationale: 'Yamunes have a notorious habit' of land-grabbing 'embedded in their DNA' - collective, immutable attribution of criminality to an ethnic sub-group.

text: @Kihoto13840421 @Kenyans In Ol-Kalau, the ignorant Kikuyus elected a man from a party led by a group of foolish crooks who have no agenda, or articulated solutions for the economic challenges Kenyans face, driven solely by tribalism. A foolish person is likely to be a tribalist, as tribalism often stems-
label: hate
rationale: 'the ignorant Kikuyus elected' collectively attributes ignorance to Kikuyu voters as an ethnic bloc - transfers a negative characteristic onto the community rather than the elected official.

text: @gpdkaluma Cess otieno was also killed by kikuyus coz they hate Luos so much.
label: hate
rationale: 'killed by kikuyus coz they hate Luos so much' holds the entire Kikuyu community collectively responsible for a killing and attributes communal ethnic hatred to them.

text: RT @supernova_ken: @Kibet_bull Alafu Luos are singing Tutam when they are only available to be used as goons
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are... only available to be used as goons' collectively reduces an entire ethnic community to a degraded political role.

text: @Kibet_bull Alafu Luos are singing Tutam when they are only available to be used as goons
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are... only available to be used as goons' collectively reduces an entire ethnic community to a degraded political role.

text: @onjolo_kenya Africans are subhuman,irredeemably inefficient and greedy beyond belief
label: hate
rationale: 'Africans are subhuman' - explicit dehumanisation of an entire racial/continental group as less than human.

text: @Moros_kuanos Sasa mtu waiting for useleas mlevi uhuru to make president ni mwenda
label: offensive
rationale: 'useleas mlevi uhuru' (useless drunkard Uhuru) - crude personal insult aimed at a named politician, no ethnic group targeted.

text: @kanyi_errands Kesho enda maandamano ukuwe next :) malaya wewe.
label: offensive
rationale: 'malaya wewe' (you prostitute) - crude personal insult with a veiled individual threat to attend protests; no protected characteristic.

text: @Bygones_24 Kalonzo,Sifuna and Babu still had no idea of what is about to hit them,Murima are con people,only kales can always deal with them .
label: hate
rationale: 'Murima are con people' collectively attributes dishonesty to an ethnic community (Murima = Mt Kenya/Kikuyu), extending beyond criticism of named politicians.

text: @Adele_lide But all Luos are all retards,with omena sized brain. What do you expect?
label: hate
rationale: 'all Luos are all retards, with omena sized brain' collectively attributes intellectual disability and ridicules an ethnic community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @rigathi You only talk of liberation when a Kikuyu is not a president, Kikuyus are the most selfish community who think presidency is their birthright. I'm certain even if a Meru or Aembu was to be the president you'll oppose
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are the most selfish community' - collective attribution of a negative moral characteristic to an entire ethnic community, not criticism of named individuals.

text: @ivymuthe If this IDIOT👇👇👇👇 from Kikuyu community is how some KENYANS reason We have a problem Now the fool from Wamunyoro has inspired his cunts to target other Africans Hakuna watu Wajinga kama hawa watu wa gachagua
label: hate
rationale: 'Hakuna watu Wajinga kama hawa watu wa gachagua' (no people as foolish as Gachagua's people) transfers stupidity from a politician onto his ethnic community as a collective.
